In this Science the following subjects arc dealt with in the
Samhita :—The movements of the planets headed by the Sun,
their nature and change, if any, their magnitude, colour, rays,
lustre, shape, setting, rising, orbit, change of motion on their
route, retrograde and direct motion; upward motion, conjunction
with a star or planet, and their course among these; the division
of the constellations among the countries and their effects on the
latter; the movement of Agastya (Canopus) and its rise, the course
of the seven sages i.e. the* constellation called Ursa Major, and
